sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Line Movement System
special_mechanics.description: Players can jump between foreground and background lines during combat, a core Fatal Fury series mechanic

special_mechanics.name: Combo System
special_mechanics.description: Fatal Fury Special introduced a new combo system allowing players to chain attacks together. Brief invincibility window exists when an attack lands

special_mechanics.name: Low Line Jump Attack
special_mechanics.description: Pressing Light Punch or Light Kick while opponent is on opposite line performs a Low Line Jump Attack

feel_descriptors: faster game speed (relative to Fatal Fury 2)
tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no quantified physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values). No sub-pixel system information available. Genesis version documented as port with Sega CD release noted for 1995, but source material does not distinguish Genesis-specific physics variations.
